glosses.ja: 導入する; 輸入する

sentences.target: Wir wollen morgen eine neue App einführen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnɔɪ̯ə ɛp ˈaɪ̯nˌfyːʁən/

translations.de: Wir wollen morgen eine neue App einführen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈvɔlən ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈnɔɪ̯ə ɛp ˈaɪ̯nˌfyːʁən/
translations.en: We want to introduce a new app tomorrow.
translations.es: Queremos lanzar una nueva aplicación mañana.
translations.fr: Nous voulons lancer une nouvelle application demain.
translations.it: Vogliamo lanciare una nuova app domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们打算明天发布一款新应用。
translations.yue: 我哋打算聽日推出新嘅app。
translations.ru: Мы хотим завтра выпустить новое приложение.
translations.pt: Queremos lançar um novo aplicativo amanhã.
translations.he: אנחנו רוצים להשיק אפליקציה חדשה מחר.
translations.tr: Yarın yeni bir uygulama çıkarmak istiyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi muốn ra mắt một ứng dụng mới vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: We willen morgen een nieuwe app lanceren.
translations.uk: Ми хочемо завтра випустити новий додаток.
translations.hu: Holnap egy új alkalmazást szeretnénk elindítani.
translations.hi: हम कल एक नया ऐप लॉन्च करना चाहते हैं।
translations.el: Θέλουμε αύριο να κυκλοφορήσουμε μια νέα εφαρμογή.
translations.nb: Vi vil lansere en ny app i morgen.
translations.id: Kami ingin meluncurkan aplikasi baru besok.
translations.sv: Vi vill lansera en ny app i morgon.
translations.ro: Vrem să lansăm mâine o aplicație nouă.
translations.da: Vi vil lancere en ny app i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日新しいアプリをリリースする予定です。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary (1st person plural, present) expressing intention; selects an infinitive.
Temporal adverb indicating when the action happens.
Indefinite article (feminine singular accusative) for the noun 'App'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'App'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative).
Main lexical verb in the infinitive (separable verb); here ‘to introduce/roll out (a product)’, placed clause-finally due to the modal.

sentences.target: Ich soll dich in die Aufgaben einführen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç zɔl dɪç ɪn diː ˈaʊ̯fˌɡaːbn̩ ˈaɪ̯nˌfyːʁən/

translations.de: Ich soll dich in die Aufgaben einführen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç zɔl dɪç ɪn diː ˈaʊ̯fˌɡaːbn̩ ˈaɪ̯nˌfyːʁən/
translations.en: I'm supposed to introduce you to the tasks.
translations.zh-Hans: 我负责带你熟悉这些任务。
translations.yue: 我應該同你講解啲工作內容。
translations.ru: Мне нужно познакомить тебя с задачами.
translations.pt: Eu tenho que te apresentar as tarefas.
translations.he: אני אמור להסביר לך את המשימות.
translations.vi: Tôi phải hướng dẫn bạn về các nhiệm vụ.
translations.ar: من المفترض أن أشرح لك المهام.
translations.nl: Ik moet je de taken uitleggen.
translations.uk: Я маю ознайомити тебе із завданнями.
translations.hi: मुझे तुम्हें कामों के बारे में समझाना है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να σου εξηγήσω τις αρμοδιότητες.
translations.nb: Jeg skal sette deg inn i oppgavene.
translations.id: Saya harus menjelaskan tugas-tugas kepada kamu.
translations.sv: Jag ska gå igenom uppgifterna med dig.
translations.da: Jeg skal sætte dig ind i opgaverne.
translations.fi: Minun on tarkoitus perehdyttää sinut tehtäviin.
translations.ja: あなたに仕事の内容を説明することになっています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary (1st person singular, present) indicating obligation/assignment; selects an infinitive.
2nd person singular accusative pronoun; direct object.
Preposition (takes accusative here) indicating movement/transition into a domain/topic.
Definite article (plural accusative) for 'Aufgaben'.
Plural noun; object of the preposition 'in'.
Infinitive main verb: ‘to introduce/familiarize (someone) with tasks’; clause-final due to the modal.

sentences.target: Du kannst die SIM-Karte vorsichtig einführen.

translations.de: Du kannst die SIM-Karte vorsichtig einführen.
translations.en: You can carefully insert the SIM card.
translations.es: Puedes insertar la tarjeta SIM con cuidado.
translations.fr: Tu peux insérer la carte SIM avec précaution.
translations.it: Puoi inserire la SIM con attenzione.
translations.pt: Você pode inserir o chip com cuidado.
translations.he: אתה יכול להכניס את כרטיס ה-SIM בזהירות.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể cẩn thận lắp thẻ SIM.
translations.nl: Je kunt de simkaart voorzichtig plaatsen.
translations.hi: आप सावधानी से SIM कार्ड डाल सकते हैं.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βάλεις προσεκτικά την κάρτα SIM.
translations.nb: Du kan sette inn SIM-kortet forsiktig.
translations.id: Kamu bisa memasukkan kartu SIM dengan hati-hati.
translations.sv: Du kan försiktigt sätta i SIM-kortet.
translations.ro: Poți introduce cu grijă cartela SIM.
translations.da: Du kan forsigtigt sætte SIM-kortet i.
translations.ja: SIMカードを慎重に挿入してください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative subject pronoun.
Modal auxiliary (2nd person singular, present) expressing ability/permission; selects an infinitive.
Definite article (feminine singular accusative) for 'SIM-Karte'.
Compound common noun; direct object (accusative).
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase.
Infinitive main verb meaning physical insertion; clause-final due to the modal.

sentences.target: Unsere Firma will fair gehandelten Kaffee einführen.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzərə ˈfɪʁma vɪl fɛːɐ̯ ɡəˈhandəltən kaˈfeː ˈaɪ̯nˌfyːʁən/

translations.de: Unsere Firma will fair gehandelten Kaffee einführen.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzərə ˈfɪʁma vɪl fɛːɐ̯ ɡəˈhandəltən kaˈfeː ˈaɪ̯nˌfyːʁən/
translations.en: Our company wants to import fair-trade coffee.
translations.es: Nuestra empresa quiere importar café de comercio justo.
translations.fr: Notre entreprise veut importer du café équitable.
translations.it: La nostra azienda vuole importare caffè equo e solidale.
translations.ko: 우리 회사는 공정무역 커피를 수입하려고 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们公司想进口公平贸易咖啡。
translations.yue: 我哋公司想入口公平貿易咖啡。
translations.ru: Наша компания хочет импортировать кофе справедливой торговли.
translations.pt: Nossa empresa quer importar café de comércio justo.
translations.he: החברה שלנו רוצה לייבא קפה בסחר הוגן.
translations.tr: Şirketimiz adil ticaret kahvesi ithal etmek istiyor.
translations.vi: Công ty chúng tôi muốn nhập khẩu cà phê thương mại công bằng.
translations.ar: تريد شركتنا استيراد قهوة التجارة العادلة.
translations.uk: Наша компанія хоче імпортувати каву справедливої торгівлі.
translations.hu: Cégünk fair trade kávét szeretne importálni.
translations.hi: हमारी कंपनी फेयर-ट्रेड कॉफी आयात करना चाहती है।
translations.pl: Nasza firma chce importować kawę ze sprawiedliwego handlu.
translations.el: Η εταιρεία μας θέλει να εισάγει καφέ δίκαιου εμπορίου.
translations.id: Perusahaan kami ingin mengimpor kopi perdagangan adil.
translations.sv: Vårt företag vill importera rättvisemärkt kaffe.
translations.ro: Compania noastră vrea să importe cafea de comerț echitabil.
translations.cs: Naše firma chce importovat kávu ze spravedlivého obchodu.
translations.fi: Yrityksemme haluaa tuoda maahan Reilu kauppa -kahvia.
translations.ja: 当社はフェアトレードのコーヒーを輸入したいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with 'Firma' (feminine singular nominative).
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) expressing volition; selects an infinitive.
Adverb modifying the participial adjective 'gehandelten' (as in ‘fair-trade’).
Past participle used adjectivally; modifies 'Kaffee'.
Common noun; direct object (accusative).
Infinitive main verb meaning ‘to introduce/start offering (a product)’; clause-final due to the modal.

app_payload.word_ja: 導入する; 輸入する
jp: Wir wollen morgen eine neue App einführen.
Ich soll dich in die Aufgaben einführen.
Du kannst die SIM-Karte vorsichtig einführen.
Unsere Firma will fair gehandelten Kaffee einführen.

Ich soll dich in die Aufgaben einführen.
Du kannst die SIM-Karte vorsichtig einführen.
Unsere Firma will fair gehandelten Kaffee einführen.

I'm supposed to introduce you to the tasks.
You can carefully insert the SIM card.
Our company wants to import fair-trade coffee.

es: Queremos lanzar una nueva aplicación mañana.
Puedes insertar la tarjeta SIM con cuidado.
Nuestra empresa quiere importar café de comercio justo.
fr: Nous voulons lancer une nouvelle application demain.
Tu peux insérer la carte SIM avec précaution.
Notre entreprise veut importer du café équitable.
it: Vogliamo lanciare una nuova app domani.
Puoi inserire la SIM con attenzione.
La nostra azienda vuole importare caffè equo e solidale.

Você pode inserir o chip com cuidado.
Nossa empresa quer importar café de comércio justo.

Ik moet je de taken uitleggen.
Je kunt de simkaart voorzichtig plaatsen.
